sections.paragraph:
plur. שְׁפָיִים masc. (from the root שָׁפָה)-

(1) baldness, nakedness, Job 33:21 כתיב, where a substantive is poetically, put for a finite verb. קרי has in the same sense שְׁפוּ, see the root in Pual.

(2) a naked hill (void of trees) (compare נִשְׁפֶּה הַר Isa 13:2). Jerem. 12:12 , שְׁפָיִם בַּמִּדְבָּר “the hills in the desert;” 3:2 , 21 4:11 7:29 14:6 Isa 41:18 49:9 Num 23:3, וַיֵּלֶךְ שֶׁ֑פִי “he went upon a hill.”

(3) [Shephi] pr.n., see שְׁפֹו .
